name: ui-regression-pinner refuses to emit a duplicate DOM regression test when the active suite already covers the rendered behavior
command: mkdir -p repo/src/components tests/e2e && (cd repo && git init -q && printf 'export const Button=()=>1\n' > src/components/Button.tsx) && printf 'test("Button renders", async ({page})=>{await page.goto("/"); await expect(page.getByText("Submit")).toBeVisible();})\n' > tests/e2e/feat-x.spec.ts && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/ui-regression-pinner.sh" --root repo --feature-id feat-x --tests-out tests/e2e --diff-stub touched=src/components/Button.tsx --active-suite tests/e2e 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'duplicate_coverage' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
